# mtncloud_user_group (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud user group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing user group by name.
data "mtncloud_user_group" "platform" {
  name = "platform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the user group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the user group.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the user group.
- `server_group` (String) Linux server group name applied to members.
